form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Comes here off a 59-day let-up. Last start failed to make an impression; 5th of 7 at Doomben 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 11 over 1650m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Abraham carrying 55.5kg at $31. Before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at Murwillumbah Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1550m, 1.0 len behind Puligny carrying 59kg at $5.50. Capable of more ? worth another chance.
